column1: # Why: Both sides are big. Internal Vendor has 100+ fields. This source has 200+ columns.
# Goal: see if mapper picks the useful fields and ignores junk.
# Clean: docker compose down -v; docker compose up -d; alembic upgrade head
# Seed SAP: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/sources/upload -F source_type=SAP -F file=@data/sap_vendors.csv | jq
# Seed many internal fields: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d entity_resolution_poc < data/stress/seed_many_vendor_fields.sql
# Upload: SRC=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/sources/upload -F source_type=MegaERP -F file=@data/stress/wide_internal_and_source_vendor.csv | jq -r .source_id)
# Good: source fields like PAY_TERMS_CODE and RISK_TIER map to existing fields payment_terms and risk_rating.
# Good: new fields may be created for sustainability_score
# Bad: EXT_VENDOR_ID overwrites vendor_code instead of becoming an identifier.
# Inspect mappings: docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -d entity_resolution_poc -c "select source_field
column4: storage from source_field_mappings order by id;"
